Class ClientCommunicationTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.administrative.model.ClientCommunicationTBL
@Entity public class ClientCommunicationTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing client communication records in the database.

This class maps to the client_communication table and stores communication from clients, such as support requests, reviews, or other feedback.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • userloginid - User who sent the communication
  • clientthoughts - The content/message from the client
  • typeofthought - Type of communication (e.g., support, review)
  • dateofthought - When the communication was sent
